title: Contact — Jodie Gosling MP
headings: h2: Want to get regular updates?
text_excerpt: Contact — Jodie Gosling MP 0 Skip to Content Jodie Gosling MP Pothole countdown Home Newsletter Updates News From Parliament FAQs Contact Open Menu Close Menu Jodie Gosling MP Pothole countdown Home Newsletter Updates News From Parliament FAQs Contact Open Menu Close Menu Pothole countdown Home Newsletter Updates News From Parliament FAQs Contact Subscribe Sign up with your email address to receive news and updates. Email Address Sign Up We respect your privacy. Thank you! Want to get regular updates? If you would like to receive my monthly newsletter, packed with updates from Westminster to Nuneaton, sign up here. If you have feedback or would like to suggest a visit in Nuneaton, please get in touch. By submitting this form you consent to being contacted by Jodie Gosling MP. You can opt out at any time by emailing me at the address above. Click the link to view our Privacy Policy . Jodie Gosling MP Follow Jodie Address: Houses of Parliament, Westminster, London SW1A 0AA, UK Email: jodie.gosling.mp@parliament.uk Telephone: 02 4 7510 5471 Follow Jodie Links Updates FAQs Contact Privacy Policy
